channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI actor Tilly Norwood to appear in debut feature film
item.description: AI-generated actor Tilly Norwood is set to star in her first feature film, with her creator stating that "art will be imitating life."

item.title: Inmate admits to killing his wife and promises to disclose body location
item.description: Delphine Jubillar disappeared in southern France in December 2020 during the COVID-19 pandemic, and her remains have not been recovered.

item.title: Beyoncé releases first new song in two years
item.description: Beyoncé released her first new song in two years, "MORNING DEW (DONK)," on the Fourth of July. Caché McClay, a music reporter for USA Today Network, has more.

item.title: 6-year-old drowns on New York beach after being caught in strong current
item.description: The girl and her family were visiting Southampton beach on the Fourth of July.
